name: Durka Simulator
short_description: A visual novel set in a universe where the orderlies are trying to take over our planet.
detailed_description:
A visual novel set in a universe where the orderlies are trying to take over our planet.

"Welcome to a new universe, comrade! Did you ever think that one day the orderlies would want to take over our planet? Of course not, but Mickey had to experience it for himself. Together with Enigma, they try to stop the invasion of the orderlies from another universe. You, as one of the higher ranking employees, must help them in this situation. Your goal is to find all the infinity stones, disarm the orderlies and take the stones with you back to your ship. We're sure you'll be up to the task, so good luck, comrade!"

Durka Simulator is a visual novel about a boy named Mickey and Enigma. In an attempt to stop the invasion of the orderlies, Enigma saves Mickey, after which they try to make things right together.

The game's plot is written in the knees and contains ? different endings, each one unique and containing crazy twists and turns. If you want to try something new, Durka Simulator is for you!

Features:
  • ? unique endings
  • Own characters
  • Fascinating and occasionally funny story
